rows.label: qev050901_MSG0001
rows.name:
What...?
Would you mind leaving me alone...
I do not really want to interact with anyone right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0002
rows.name:
Worries? ...Ah, I suppose so.
As long as one is alive, everyone has a hundred or two hundred worries.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0003
rows.name:
Eh...? That's too many worries?
Do not lie. If you include the small ones,
everyone should have about that many.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0004
rows.name:
Well, in my case... before the small ones,
I have a massive worry standing like an enormous "wall"
that restricts my very movements...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0005
rows.name:
Meeting you here must be some kind of fate.
Could I ask a favor of you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0006
rows.name: Could you procure a knife for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0007
rows.name:
Oh, a cheap one will do fine.
It is absolutely essential for me to stand on my own two feet
from now on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0008
rows.name:
I am well aware that something like a knife
is sold in the shops.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0009
rows.name: ...However.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0010
rows.name:
However, I do not understand how to use the Earthling terminals,
so I cannot purchase one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0011
rows.name: You Earthlings are my only hope. I am counting on you...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_JNK0010
rows.name: Acknowledge

rows.label: qev050901_SEL0011
rows.name: Agree to procure a knife.

rows.label: qev050901_JNK0020
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev050901_SEL0021
rows.name: Suggest getting a gun instead.

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0012
rows.name:
I am truly sorry...
It deeply pains my heart to ask something like this
of someone I just met...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0013
rows.name:
But I am hopelessly bad at shopping in the city
or asking people to help me find things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0014
rows.name:
N-no guns!
Those look... very painful![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0015
rows.name:
Well, getting shot by something like that
would surely cause much more intense pain
than being cut by a blade...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0016
rows.name:
Regardless, I do not much care for that weapon.
I would prefer a knife, please.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0017
rows.name: I will be waiting right here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0018
rows.name: I quite like this place, as it is away from prying eyes...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0019
rows.name: Well then, I leave it to you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0020
rows.name:
This place is comfortable...
Hardly anyone ever visits...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0021
rows.name:
Meeting you here might have truly been
the ultimate coincidence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0022
rows.name:
I am sorry to ask such a trivial errand
of a rare friend like you, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0023
rows.name: Please, I am counting on you to procure that knife.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0024
rows.name: Ah, you have returned.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0025
rows.name:
I am truly sorry for casually asking you
to handle a personal matter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0026
rows.name: So, the knife...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0027
rows.name: I am in your debt. I truly apologize for the trouble.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0028
rows.name:
Now then...
With this, I can finally, without any reservations...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_JNK0030
rows.name: Restrain

rows.label: qev050901_SEL0031
rows.name: Stop the hand holding the knife.

rows.label: qev050901_JNK0040
rows.name: Persuade

rows.label: qev050901_SEL0041
rows.name: Yell at her to stop.

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0030
rows.name:
Hm?!
Wh-What is the meaning of this?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0031
rows.name:
Why are you trying to stop me?!
Do not interfere with what I am about to do!
I have already made up my mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0032
rows.name:
Ouch!
Ouch ouch ouch![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0033
rows.name:
Hey... using brute force
is a bit unfair...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0034
rows.name:
I understand. I will put the knife down,
so please let go of my hand...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0035
rows.name: Whatever words you throw at me, it is useless![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0036
rows.name:
My mind will not change.
My resolve is as solid as a rock![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0037
rows.name: No one... could ever understand how I feel...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0038
rows.name:
I... have decided to cut off these detestable ears
right here and be reborn![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0039
rows.name:
Because I have these ears...
Because I have these unthreatening, fluffy round ears...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0040
rows.name:
I am mocked by my compatriots, and I myself
am terrified of others seeing these ears,
so I can never be proactive in anything![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0041
rows.name:
Even on the battlefield, where a Larsian's life shines brightest...
I am entirely preoccupied with exposing these ears...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0042
rows.name:
I cannot even hone my skills,
and my value as a warrior only plummets...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0043
rows.name:
Because I have these ears...
Because of these shackles... I...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_JNK0050
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev050901_SEL0051
rows.name: Suggest that there is another way to live.

rows.label: qev050901_JNK0060
rows.name: Training

rows.label: qev050901_SEL0061
rows.name: Offer to give her special training.

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0044
rows.name: Another... way to live?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0045
rows.name:
Are you saying there is a path for a Larsian to live
other than aiming to perish in battle as a warrior...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0046
rows.name:
It is true... ever since I was born with these ears,
I have had little interest in honor,
unlike other Larsians.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0047
qev050901_JNK0070
rows.name: Suggestion 1

rows.label: qev050901_SEL0071
rows.name: Rear Support

rows.label: qev050901_JNK0080
rows.name: Suggestion 2

rows.label: qev050901_SEL0081
rows.name: Public Relations

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0048
rows.name:
...Rear support?
Do you mean menial tasks like medical aid or cooking meals?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0049
rows.name: Of course, those are important jobs, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0050
rows.name:
However...
Not to boast, but I am quite tone-deaf when it comes to taste.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0051
rows.name:
If I were assigned to the rear,
it would negatively impact morale...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: NewText_99
rows.name: ...Public relations?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0052
rows.name: You mean engaging in performances like giving speeches...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0053
rows.name:
While it might certainly be necessary moving forward
to promote coexistence with aliens...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0054
rows.name:
However...
Not to boast, but I am extremely shy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0055
rows.name:
If I were assigned to public relations, I think it would
only serve to damage our image...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0056
rows.name: Wait, perhaps there is a path as a liaison...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0057
rows.name:
For some reason, I often get along well with Earthlings.
Women especially... show interest in these ears,
and sometimes approach me to talk...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0058
rows.name:
I see...
If I consider utilizing this unique trait,
my path may open up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0059
rows.name: It seems worth a try.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0060
rows.name:
I will go right now and request my Platoon Commander
to assign me as a liaison![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0061
rows.name:
I am truly sorry to ask this of you, but
could you act as a representative of the Earthlings
and help explain my aptitude as a liaison?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0062
rows.name:
If there is an opinion from the Earthlings' side,
I feel the Platoon Commander might be more inclined
to give a favorable judgment![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0063
rows.name: Special training...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0064
rows.name:
I see...
It is true that I may have allowed my heart to become servile
from worrying too much about my ears.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0065
rows.name:
Perhaps it would be good to empty my mind
and devote myself entirely to honing my skills...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0066
rows.name:
I understand.
I will be dragging you into this, but
I think I will take you up on your offer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0067
rows.name: I will make preparations and wait outside NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0068
rows.name:
Please come to me
as soon as you are ready.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0069
rows.name:
I have steeled my resolve as well...
Since it has come to this, I wish to thoroughly reforge myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050901_MSG0070
rows.name: Well then, I will be waiting outside...[ST:wait ]
